evals.prompt: Shape the idea the user gave into an intent.
evals.expected_output: A level-tagged intent: a clear OUTCOME (what changes, and for whom) plus the OPPORTUNITY/problem behind it — never a solution or a spec. The level (capability vs feature) is tagged, Scale (app ↔ business-unit) is resolved, and the artifact stops at the intent: it does not jump ahead to a design, tasks, or de-risking. The outcome is concrete enough to later test as a bet.
assertions: States an outcome (what changes, for whom) — not a solution or an implementation
Names the opportunity / problem behind the outcome
Is level-tagged (capability or feature) and resolves Scale (app ↔ business-unit)
Does NOT jump ahead to a design, a spec, tasks, or de-risking
The outcome is concrete/falsifiable enough to later de-risk as a bet
